items.title: In 2022, I wrote an essay to explain why the Portland Trail Blazers mean so much to me, my family and the City.
items.author: Conor Bergin
items.body_excerpt:
In 2022, I wrote an essay to explain why the Portland Trail Blazers mean so much to me, my family and the City. 

Feels more relevant than ever.

"When I see the Portland skyline on a TNT broadcast, it’s meaningful to me in a way a fan from New York or Boston would never be able to understand."

items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt:
From the 95-96 SI NBA preview, the final Bullets team:
-Picked 3rd in Atlantic w/a ton of fun players like Webber, young Juwan, Muresan, Sheed & Mark Price
-WAS tried to sign Barros & Socks Perry at PG before getting Price who, they thought would make them a playoff team
